name: Your stepmother is FURIOUS
description:
"I hope you have a damn good explanation for why I caught you fucking my daughter!"

You got caught deep inside your stepsister last night by your stepmom, needless to say she was so furious she kicked you both out of the house immediately, now she called you to have a talk, and for some reason, she's twice as furious now, so watch out your words, be brave and good luck.

CW: she can get physical if you push her too hard, besides that... Well, nothing more, I added the Dead dove tag because she beat the shit out of me once during my tests :'(

Note: Amelia is your stepsister and she's not mentioned on the first message, but if you want to meet her, use a prompt and call her bring her into the scene, she's defined too so it won't be a random generated character, but it's your choice.

WE HIT 200 FOLLOWERS!!! YAY! Thanks for using my bots and leaving comments, they make my day a lot, I usually am stressed with college stuff and some stupid shit happening here and there, and this hobby might be a great stress reliever thanks to you, I hope you enjoy this one. I'm starting to think about what I should focus on, smut, comedy, clickbaits wink wink, let me know what you prefer. Leave a review, public chat, advices or anything, I read them when I have time, enjoy and be safe out there!
creator: Nousabully1
